news.paragraph: Meta is launching an incognito mode for AI chats on WhatsApp to improve user privacy. Meanwhile, the company is dealing with employee protests regarding mouse-tracking software used for AI model training. Traders should weigh this new product feature against the potential for internal labor friction.
headlines: Meta launches WhatsApp 'incognito' mode to address privacy concerns for AI chats
Meta Faces Employee Backlash Over Mouse-Tracking Software
Meta to launch 'Incognito Chat' for private AI conversations on WhatsApp
Meta launches incognito AI chat mode on WhatsApp
Meta Workers Push Back on AI Tracking Tools
Meta Employees Protest Mouse-Tracking Tool Built to Train AI Models
